name: Maiming Crystal
description: This weapon has a twisted haft or grip and spikes along its blade, head, or point. A maiming weapon twists and digs into the flesh of its target, rending, tearing, smashing, and bruising it. Whenever you score a critical hit with this weapon, it deals an amount of extra damage depending on its critical multiplier. Critical ×2: 1d6. ×3: 2d6. ×4: 3d6.
unidentifiedDesc: A twisted, spiked weapon augmentation crystal.
